title: Ec2SsmCycle executor
description: Starts EC2 instances, executes an SSM document, and optionally stops instances when done.

region.description: AWS region where EC2 and SSM commands are executed.

documentName.description: SSM document name. Defaults to AWS-RunShellScript.

imageRef.description: Container image reference to deploy. Falls back to RUNNER_IMAGE_REF env var when omitted.

commands.description: Explicit shell commands. When omitted, Docker deploy commands are generated.

containerName.description: Container name used by generated deploy commands.

hostPort.description: Host port used by generated deploy commands. Must be set together with containerPort.

containerPort.description: Container port used by generated deploy commands. Must be set together with hostPort.

additionalRunArgs.description: Additional Docker run arguments used by generated deploy commands.

timeoutMs.description: Maximum wait time for SSM command execution completion.

pollIntervalMs.description: Polling interval while waiting for SSM command completion.

startWaitTimeoutMs.description: Maximum wait time for instances to become running.

stopWaitTimeoutMs.description: Maximum wait time for instances to become stopped.

expectBootstrapShutdown.description: When true, the executor expects an initial bootstrap boot to stop itself before the deployment boot.

stopAfterCompletion.description: Stop instances after command completes or fails.

stopOnlyIfStarted.description: When true, only stop instances that this executor started.
